name: Easy and Elegant Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef sirloin steak, cut across grain - bite size
6 oz Portobello mushrooms or white mushrooms
2 tbsp Balsalmic vinegar or 1 Tbsp Red-wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle steak strips with half the pepper.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large, preferably nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add sliced mushrooms, whites of scallions, and remaining pepper. Cook, stirring often, until mushrooms are tender, about 8 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon to a bowl.
4. Wipe the skillet clean. Add remaining butter and heat over high heat until sizzling.
5. Add beef strips and stir-fry about 2 minutes until browned.
6. Stir in gravy and vinegar; bring to a boil.
7. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream until blended.
8. Sprinkle with green parts of scallions.
9. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 184 cal, 19 g protein, 6 g carbs, 10 g fat, 342 mg sodium. Reprinted from Woman's Day magazine, April 1996.
